title: Server-Side Request Forgery Prevention Cheat Sheet¶
attack_vector:
Server-Side Request Forgery Prevention Cheat Sheet
¶
Introduction
¶
The objective of the cheat sheet is to provide advices regarding the protection against
Server Side Request Forgery
(SSRF) attack.
This cheat sheet will focus on the defensive point of view and will not explain how to perform this attack. This
talk
from the security researcher
Orange Tsai
as well as this
document
provide techniques on how to perform this kind of attack.
